input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.4.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.4.3.1
            TITLE: testing requirements

            CONTENT:
            rule F.4.3.1: Testing Requirements
F.4.3.1 Testing Requirements 
a. Any tested samples must be engraved with the construction date, sample name, and 
peak test force. 
b. The same set of test results must not be used for different monocoques in different 
years. 
The intent is for the test panel to use the same material batch, material age, material storage, 
and student layup quality as the monocoque.

final_answer: F.4.3.1 Testing Requirements a. Any tested samples must be engraved with the construction date, sample name, and peak test force. b. The same set of test results must not be used for different monocoques in different years. The intent is for the test panel to use the same material batch, material age, material storage, and student layup quality as the monocoque.
